title: AMERICAN CIVIL LIBERTIES UNION - 211info
text: AMERICAN CIVIL LIBERTIES UNION AMERICAN CIVIL LIBERTIES UNION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Advocacy organization concerned with cases involving questions of civil liberties, including rights guaranteed by the US and State Constitutions. Does not provide direct representation to individuals or organizations, but advocates for the passage of laws to protect civil rights and reviews and monitors proposed ballot initiatives. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Visit Website INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Constitutional/Civil Rights Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: INFORMATION SERVICES - IMMIGRANTS' RIGHTS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
